changes.value: warning: lib.rs doc example omits XDG_NAME from DirectoryConfig impl

changes.forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -1 +1 @@
-`swissarmyhammer-directory/src/lib.rs:43-59`

The crate-level doc example for implementing `DirectoryConfig` is:
```rust
impl DirectoryConfig for MyToolConfig {
    const DIR_NAME: &'static str = ".mytool";
    const GITIGNORE_CONTENT: &'static str = "*.log\ntmp/\n";
    ...
}
```

It is missing `const XDG_NAME: &'static str = "mytool";`, which is now a required associated constant of the trait. This will cause a compile error for any user that copies the example verbatim.

Suggestion: Add `const XDG_NAME: &'static str = "mytool";` to the example in the doc comment.
\ No newline at end of file
